title: 追想のインスピレーション

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I became Satono Diamond's official trainer,
but each day comes with new surprises.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm appointing you vice director of the School-Wide Floral
Makeover Project!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're not familiar? Um, the School-Wide Floral Makeover
Project is...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As its name suggests, an annual event where volunteers decorate the
whole school with flowers!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And I'm directing the project this year! ♪ It's a big responsibility!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To guarantee success, I'll need a vice director with a cool head and
eye for detail—that's you, Trainer! I can think of no one better!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Thank you! Let's brighten up the school and put a smile on
everyone's faces!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We'll hang colorful baskets everywhere, and make a whole mini
ecosystem out of the courtyard... Oh, there are so many options!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you think? I was just picturing the western-style garden my family
owns...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But now that you mention it, we might not have the manpower. Hmm...
What's something else we could try?
choice_data_list: Let's scope the school out for ideas.
Let's scope the school out for ideas.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've already seen so many places that could use some floral
decorating. Let's check the school building next!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'm sorry, we didn't know someone was already here.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Um... sniff. I-it's okay. Hic! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: She left...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A lot of students come here when things get tough. Some alone time
can help sort out your feelings.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know! If there were some flowers...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Vice Director?! We could put a planter here!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Flowers are soothing for the heart, no matter how down you're
feeling. They're sure to cheer the students up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it just? It's genius, if I say so myself. Hehe, you know, this really
takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Do you remember when my parents and McQueen gave us their
approval?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Our number one goal... is achieving our dream. Not passing today's
trial.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we only trained the qualities I need right now. Even if you might
not like it...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just like back then, what we need right now isn't to pretty up the
school...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's to brighten everyone's day! Once again, you've helped me realize
what's important.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Vice Director! Let's prepare our presentation right away! With our
teamwork, I just know we'll create a plan that will knock everyone's
socks off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of the day working, barely finishing in time for
curfew. The next day...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...And that's our proposal for this year's project! What do you think,
everyone?

text_block_list.name: Upperclassman A
text_block_list.text: I'm for it! I think it's great!

text_block_list.name: Upperclassman B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Great job, Dia! I can't believe you put all of this together by
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, this wasn't all me—I couldn't have done it without my trainer's
help!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We worked in the library until late last night. I couldn't have asked for
a better assistant!

text_block_list.name: Upperclassman B
text_block_list.text:
No wonder! I'm impressed you can be so open and, like... proactive! I
always feel bad asking adults for help.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...You think so?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The older student's words don't quite seem to click for Satono
Diamond. Her earnest nature ensures she never hesitates to ask for
help—or give it in turn.
